creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Christos Margiolis from comment #15)

I can hear audio glitches with both oss and sndio backends. The sound is distorted in different way though for better or worse.

Latest tested versions:
- Firefox 132.0.1
- FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n273492-6ac22dc3d823 GENERIC amd64
